reviews.comment:
Pesima atencion. No tienen ganas de trabajar. La mujer que me atendio en la entrada habla de muy mala manera y hasta me tiro las hojas en vez de darmelas en la mano. La boleta bui se paga a traves de unas maquinas que ni siquiera los mismos empleados saben usarla. El sistema se cayo tres veces en el dia de hoy. Se la pasan charlando y comiendo y el trato es terriblemente malo

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. They have no desire to work. The woman who helped me at the entrance spoke rudely and even threw the papers at me instead of giving them to me. The "boui" ticket is paid through machines that even the employees don't know how to use. The system crashed three times today. They spend their time chatting and eating, and the service is terribly bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnallqWXRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Apenas ingresas te atiende un duo de señoras con muy pocas ganas. Se ve que la atención al publico no es lo que les gusta sin embargo trabajan en la recepción de las oficinas para renovar el registro. Luego bien la atencion de admisión, vision psicólogo y audiologo. Algo extraño fue que el sector de médico y control de gestión cantaban entre ellas bastante fuerte dando un clima de "descontrol". Aunque su atención fue correcta. En el medio del tramite se "quedaron sin sistema" lo cual sospecho que símplemente les andaba lento la PC ya que sólo sucedió en el sector de Médico. Esto demoró todo el procedo unos 30 minutos.
En conclusión, el tramite llevó 2hs, algunas personas te atienden bastante mal pero pude terminar el tramite lo cual para las oficinas públicas de este pais no es poca cosa.

(Translated by Google)
As soon as you walk in, you're served by a pair of unenthusiastic women. It's clear they don't like customer service, but they work at the front desk to renew your registration. The receptionists, vision psychologist, and audiologist were all fine. Something strange was that the medical and administrative staff were singing quite loudly among themselves, creating a somewhat "out-of-control" atmosphere. Although their service was decent, in the middle of the process, they "lost their system," which I suspect was simply a slow computer, since it only happened in the medical department. This delayed the entire process about 30 minutes.
In conclusion, the process took two hours. Some people were quite rude, but I was able to complete the process, which is no small feat for public offices in this country.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNkttc1NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion!, hoy fui a renovar el registro sin turno y en 30/40 minutos tenía el carnet en la mano. Literalmente no tuve tiempo de sentarme. Todos profesionales y expeditivos. Si sos socio, estacionas en el 1er piso y te vas rápido con el carnet en la mano. Me sorprendió que en la sede de flores tuvieran las mismas prestaciones del ACA central. 100% recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! Today I went to renew my registration without an appointment and had my card in my hand within 30-40 minutes. I literally didn't have time to sit down. Everyone was professional and prompt. If you're a member, you park on the first floor and leave quickly with your card in hand. I was surprised that the flower branch offered the same services as the central ACA. 100% recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnb2Rxbm1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención de los playeros , no hay un encargado que organize el trabajo. Son extremadamente lentos para atender los surtidores , pagamos la cuota del ACA , para recibir este pésimo servicio .

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service from the beach attendants; there's no manager to organize the work. They're extremely slow at servicing the pumps. We pay the ACA fee to receive this terrible service.

reviews.comment:
Es una cafetería con servicio completo bar y para ser caferiria tiene servicio de comidas hechas al momento servicio de wifi un local muy grande cómodo y excelente adaptado para discapacitados con baños rampas y demás además posee en su interior un patio interno con mesas sombrillas y demás servicios y como si esto fuera poco tiene unos precios muy económicos con una calidad excelente tiene comida vegas etc
En síntesis la relación calidad precio es excelente digno se recomendar
La única pega es que se encuentra dentro de la estación de servicio (no todo es perfecto)

(Translated by Google)
It's a full-service café/bar, and for a café, it offers freshly prepared meals, Wi-Fi, a very large, comfortable, and excellent accessibility for people with disabilities, including restrooms, ramps, and more. It also has an interior patio with tables, umbrellas, and other amenities. And if that weren't enough, it has very affordable prices and excellent quality, with food like Vegas, etc.
In short, the value for money is excellent and it's well worth recommending. The only downside is that it's located inside a gas station (nothing's perfect).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBejhTejBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estacion ypf gigante. Los fines de semana carga mucha gente. En este luhar del aca se puede hacer la renovacion del registro. Tambien se puede sacar el registro internacional si vas a viajar al exterior. Aceptan debito y todas las tarjetas. Todos los servicios. Muy buena atencion.

(Translated by Google)
Giant YPF station. It's very busy on weekends. You can renew your vehicle registration at this location. You can also get an international registration if you're traveling abroad. They accept debit and all major cards. All services. Very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRc0lYQVpREAE
